unexpected.title: Unexpected error
unexpected.message: Please retry or reload the page

auth.title: Authentication error
auth.configMissing: Auth0 configuration is missing. Set VITE_AUTH0_DOMAIN, VITE_AUTH0_CLIENT_ID, and VITE_AUTH0_AUDIENCE, or set VITE_AUTH_MODE=mock only for local mock auth.

permission.title: You do not have the required access or scope for this data
permission.message: The current account does not have the required permission, data scope, or account context for this screen.

reason.missingPermission: The current account is missing the required permission for this screen.
reason.missingScope: The current account may have the feature permission but is missing the required data scope.
reason.missingAccountContext: The current account is missing the account context required for this screen.
reason.missingCapabilities:
Unable to load access data

The system could not load the permission or access capability data required for this screen.
Please retry. If the error continues, contact a system administrator.
reason.unknown: The current account does not meet the access requirements for this screen.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.message: This route does not exist in the admin shell

validation.invalidTransition: This action is not available for the current status.

conflict.message: The request conflicts with an existing record.
